title: Trial of the Warded Grounds
description: The Elder Ward has summoned you. The ancient guardian beasts have grown restless — only a proven Jester may claim the Ward Stone and restore balance.

stages.description: Find Elder Ward in the Warding Grounds.
Battle through the guardian beasts that protect the Ward Stone.
Touch the Ward Stone at the center of the Grounds.

title: The Astral Hunt
description: With the Ward Stone claimed, a new constellation burns over the Grounds. Gather every scattered Jester - only the full company can answer what prowls between the stars.

stages.description: Verity Vex, Cogsworth, and Sir Paradox wait somewhere in the Warding Grounds.

stages.objective: Answer the howl at the Star Sigil
stages.description: Something vast walks down out of the constellations. Meet it at the Star Sigil.
